text: Add a section to http://www.freebsd.org/news/press.html July {when stats published for June?} 2011 Text: July 2011: FreeBSD the OS of top 3 most reliable hosting company sites in June 2011 (Tip from Mason Loring Bliss a non subscribed poster to advocacy@ Message-id: <20110803031147.GF3896@blisses.org> Date: Tue, 2 Aug 2011 23:11:47 -0400 (Wed 05:11 CEST) who would not then use http://www.freebsd.org/send-pr.html ) Fix: Add text above
